questions.question: Describe the process by which your Android app can play an audio file using the MediaPlayer class. Provide an example of how to play a sound effect in a UI button click event.
questions.hint: Explain the steps involved in playing audio, and provide a sample code snippet

questions.question: What is the difference between playing a video using the MediaPlayer or the VideoView class in Android? Provide an example of when to use each.
questions.hint: Explain the differences in functionality and usage between MediaPlayer and VideoView

questions.question: How can your Android app convert text into speech using the TextToSpeech class? Describe the different parameters that can be passed to the engine, and provide an example of how to use it in a UI button click event.
questions.hint: Explain the steps involved in converting text to speech, and provide a sample code snippet
